## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore/ci/refactor

## Images affected

- [ ] sandbox-lite
- [ ] sandbox-base

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows conventional commits (for Release Please), e.g. `feat: ...` or `fix: ...`
- [ ] I tested the build locally with `docker build`
- [ ] CI test build passes
- [ ] I updated the image README if tooling changed
